channel.title: FNF — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on FNF (Fidelity National Financial) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Seth Klarman: NEW POSITION FNF (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) new position FNF in Q4 2025 · 5.7% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Seth Klarman)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED FNF (+29%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added FNF in Q4 2025 · 0.3% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)
